creator: jeremy@external.org
text:
# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	ipsc
#	ipsc/pkg
#	ipsc/pkg/COMMENT
#	ipsc/pkg/DESCR
#	ipsc/pkg/PLIST
#	ipsc/pkg/PLIST.gnome
#	ipsc/patches
#	ipsc/patches/patch-aa
#	ipsc/files
#	ipsc/files/md5
#	ipsc/Makefile
#
echo c - ipsc
mkdir -p ipsc > /dev/null 2>&1
echo c - ipsc/pkg
mkdir -p ipsc/pkg > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - ipsc/pkg/COMMENT
sed 's/^X//' >ipsc/pkg/COMMENT << 'END-of-ipsc/pkg/COMMENT'
XAn IP Subnet Calculator
END-of-ipsc/pkg/COMMENT
echo x - ipsc/pkg/DESCR
sed 's/^X//' >ipsc/pkg/DESCR << 'END-of-ipsc/pkg/DESCR'
XThe IP Subnet Calculator is a tool that allows network administrators to
Xmake calculations that will assist in subnetting a network.  It also has a
Xnumber of other useful functions.
X
XWWW: http://www.interloper.net/~dan/software/software.html
X
X- Jeremy <jeremy@external.org>
END-of-ipsc/pkg/DESCR
echo x - ipsc/pkg/PLIST
sed 's/^X//' >ipsc/pkg/PLIST << 'END-of-ipsc/pkg/PLIST'
Xbin/ipsc
END-of-ipsc/pkg/PLIST
echo x - ipsc/pkg/PLIST.gnome
sed 's/^X//' >ipsc/pkg/PLIST.gnome << 'END-of-ipsc/pkg/PLIST.gnome'
Xbin/ipsc
Xbin/gipsc
END-of-ipsc/pkg/PLIST.gnome
echo c - ipsc/patches
mkdir -p ipsc/patches > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - ipsc/patches/patch-aa
sed 's/^X//' >ipsc/patches/patch-aa << 'END-of-ipsc/patches/patch-aa'
X--- Makefile.orig	Thu Oct 28 20:35:58 1999
X+++ Makefile	Thu Oct 28 20:37:07 1999
X@@ -2,8 +2,8 @@
X CFLAGS = -g -Wall -O2
X LIBS = -lm
X 
X-GTKLIBS = `gtk-config --libs`
X-GTKFLAGS = `gtk-config --cflags`
X+GTKLIBS = `gtk12-config --libs`
X+GTKFLAGS = `gtk12-config --cflags`
X 
X all: ipsc gipsc
X 
END-of-ipsc/patches/patch-aa
echo c - ipsc/files
mkdir -p ipsc/files > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - ipsc/files/md5
sed 's/^X//' >ipsc/files/md5 << 'END-of-ipsc/files/md5'
XMD5 (ipsc-0.3.2-src.tar.gz) = 3dc35a4baa461cb4fe5164e798419e90
END-of-ipsc/files/md5
echo x - ipsc/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >ipsc/Makefile << 'END-of-ipsc/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	ipsc
X# Version required:	0.3.2
X# Date created:		31 October 1999
X# Whom:			Jeremy Shaffner <jeremy@external.org>
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XDISTNAME=	ipsc-0.3.2-src
XPKGNAME=	ipsc-0.3.2
XCATEGORIES=	sysutils gnome
XMASTER_SITES=	http://www.interloper.net/~dan/software/dist/ipsc/
X
XMAINTAINER=	jeremy@external.org
X
XBUILD_DEPENDS=	${WRKDIRPREFIX}${PORTSDIR}/misc/prips/work/prips.o:${PORTSDIR}/misc/prips:build
X.if defined(USE_GNOME)
XLIB_DEPENDS=	gtk12.2:${PORTSDIR}/x11-toolkits/gtk12
X.endif
X
XWRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/ipsc
X
X.if defined(USE_GNOME)
XPLIST=		${PKGDIR}/PLIST.gnome
XALL_TARGET=     all
X.else
XALL_TARGET=	ipsc
X.endif
X
Xpre-build:
X	@${LN} -s ${WRKDIRPREFIX}${PORTSDIR}/misc/prips/work/prips \
X		${WRKDIR}/prips
X
Xdo-install:
X	@${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/ipsc ${PREFIX}/bin
X.if defined(USE_GNOME)
X	@${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/gipsc ${PREFIX}/bin
X.endif
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-ipsc/Makefile
exit
